description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bindgen that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: rustfmt, msrv, quickchecking, test-expectations, test, test_aarch64, and test-book. Each job runs on ubuntu-latest or a specific version, checks out the repository, installs the required Rust toolchain, and runs specific commands like rustfmt, building with a minimum supported Rust version, quickchecks, testing expectations, and testing with various configurations.
